ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb identifier for the movie */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the movie */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the movie's release */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes the movie has received */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year of the movie's release */,
  "budget_adj" REAL /* Budget adjusted for inflation */,
  "revenue_adj" REAL /* Revenue adjusted for inflation */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Current production status of the movie */,
  "content_rating" TEXT /* Content rating of the movie */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast_members" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "cast_name" TEXT /* Full name of the cast member */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the cast member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the cast member is part of */,
  "character_type" TEXT /* Type of character played by the cast member */,
  "billing_order" INTEGER /* Billing order of the cast member in the movie credits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cast_members_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the director is part of */,
  "directing_experience" TEXT /* Relevant experience or notable works of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directors_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Website of the production company */,
  "company_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the production company */,
  "company_type" TEXT /* Type of production company */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword_name" TEXT /* Name of the keyword */,
  "keyword_relevance" INTEGER /* Relevance or importance of the keyword to the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the movie */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes_description" TEXT /* Brief description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_versions_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office_data" (
  "box_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each box office data entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "opening_weekend_revenue" INTEGER /* Opening weekend revenue of the movie */,
  "total_worldwide_gross" INTEGER /* Total worldwide gross of the movie */,
  "domestic_gross" INTEGER /* Domestic gross of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("box_office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_box_office_data_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
